channel.title: Frontier Watch — AI × Supply Chain
channel.description: Weekly intelligence briefing: AI developments across planning, procurement, manufacturing, commercial and the data/agent stack.

item.title: Edition 02 (Week 28, 2026) — The confirmers started firing
item.description: Outcome pricing reached the ERP suite (SAP Joule; Deloitte publishes the accounting), commerce agents went GA inside ChatGPT and Google, and Schneider moved to buy Cognite — the context-layer thesis with a price tag. 15 signals, 6 patterns, 2 watch items resolved.

item.title: Edition 01 (Week 27, 2026) — The execution layer arrived
item.description: Platforms across planning, manufacturing, CRM and logistics shipped agents that act — and the pricing model just flipped to outcomes. 15 signals, 6 patterns, first edition baseline.
